QuickBooksListId.description: Stable QuickBooks Desktop item ListID/item hex. Use this for QBD matching; QuickBooks SKU/name may change for operational sorting.

WaitlistEnabled.description: Whether the storefront may collect back-in-stock requests for this product when Medusa inventory is zero. Set false for seasonal inactive, discontinued, or internal-only items.

AvailabilityLifecycle.description: Customer catalog lifecycle separate from inventory quantity. Use active for normal sellable items; seasonal_inactive for off-season Passover items that should not accept waitlist requests.

FutureOrderEligible.description: Whether this product may accept future committed demand when the requested dispatch date is outside the replenishment window.

ReplenishmentLeadDays.description: Number of days needed before an out-of-stock product may be accepted as a future commitment. Defaults to 14 days.

SafetyStockQuantity.description: Quantity held back from customer available-to-promise calculations.

UnavailableMessage.description: Optional customer-facing copy for unavailable active products.

ExpectedAvailabilityCopy.description: Optional customer-facing estimate, e.g. 'Expected again in about 2 weeks.'

SubstitutionGroup.description: Editor-managed grouping key for similar replacement products.

AlternativeVariantIds.description: Optional comma- or newline-separated Medusa variant IDs to suggest as replacements.

AlternativeProducts.description: Optional curated replacement products for unavailable item flows.
